# AgentRoom

> AgentRoom is a local-first, runtime-agnostic coordination plane for long-running coding agents, with provider ports for runtimes, trackers, chat gateways, and local room state.

## Start

- [Overview](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=overview): AgentRoom's local-first coordination model, repository layout, tech stack, and quick start.

## Setup

- [Setup Guide](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=setup): Install local tooling, choose room shape, runtime provider, agent harness, integrations, and skills.
- [Configuration Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=configuration): Typed topology, source-of-truth rules, env overrides, secrets, and TUI editing boundaries.
- [Room Topology](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=topology): Single-project rooms, HQ rooms, hybrids, gateway ownership, and state placement tradeoffs.

## Operations

- [Coordination Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=coordination): Native room messages, handoffs, status, task shadows, escalation, and external tracker split.
- [Runtime Providers](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=runtimes): Provider-neutral launch, read, send, stop, tmux, Herdr, fake runtimes, and future adapters.

## Reference

- [Protocol Notes](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=protocol): Agent opt-in environment, structured commands, local task shadows, and Linear bridge commands.
- [Security Model](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=security): Runtime audit boundaries, scoped tokens, dangerous actions, transcript handling, and secrets.

## Architecture

- [Architecture](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=architecture): Core domain ownership, provider ports, adapters, configuration model, gateways, and daemon surfaces.
- [System Diagram](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=diagram): Docs-friendly end-to-end map of UIs, daemon, core, ports, adapters, and external systems.

## Planning

- [Roadmap](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=roadmap): Planned runtime, storage, gateway, provider, TUI, mobile, and policy milestones.
- [Milestones](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=milestones): Current delivery milestones, sequencing, implementation notes, and acceptance gates.

## Maintainer

- [Migration Notes](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=migration): Repo migration context, package split, command changes, and compatibility guidance.
- [ADR 0001: Tech Stack](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=adr-tech-stack): Decision record for AgentRoom's core language, packaging, daemon, MCP, and client choices.
- [ADR 0002: Runtime Provider Port](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=adr-runtime-provider): Decision record for the runtime provider boundary and adapter responsibilities.
- [ADR 0003: Chat Gateway Port](https://volpestyle.github.io/agent-room/?doc=adr-chat-gateway): Decision record for bidirectional chat gateway ownership and provider boundaries.
